vllm.title: Added DeciLM-7b and DeciLM-7b-instruct
vllm.author: avideci
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
New models: DeciLM-7b and DeciLM-7b-instruct
DeciLM-7b and DeciLM-7b-instruct have been released today.
It has reached first place in the OpenLLM leaderboard (7B catagory).

DeciLM-7B is a 7.04 billion parameter decoder-only text generation model, released under the Apache 2.0 license. At the time o

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix weight loading for Mixtral with TP
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #2202
Currently, the Mixtral model does not support quantization with TP > 1 because DummyModule does not use quantized linear methods. This PR removes DummyModule and instead modifies the weight loading logic to consider expert parallelism.

vllm.title: Make _prepare_sample non blocking and pin memory of CPU input buffers
vllm.author: hanzhi713
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Hide _prepare_sample latency with model execution since it looks like it doesn't depend on model forward.
We can use a copy stream for h2ds in _prepare_sample, but we probably don't really need to because these h2ds are very short.
cc @Yard1
